name: unraid-modernui
description: Clean, flat, responsive theme for Unraid 7.x. v0.5.6: unblock the Update Unraid OS confirmation modal. shell-overlay.scss's `body.modernui-shell-active footer { display:none }` rule (intended to hide Unraid's page footer) also matched the <footer> action row inside Unraid Connect's Vue dialogs, hiding the Cancel/Confirm buttons. Scoped the selector to a direct body child.

scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run test:php
